parameters.value:
=📋 *Monitoring Complete — Lite Support Offered*

*Client:* {{$json.client_name}} ({{$json.client_id}})
*Monitoring ended:* {{$json.days_past_monitoring}} days ago

Lite Support offer email sent. Pipeline updated.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({"text":":rotating_light: *SeedLink Client Onboarding Orchestrator — Error Alert*

*Workflow:* SeedLink - Client Onboarding Orchestrator
*Error Node:* "+($json.execution?.error?.node || 'Unknown')+"
*Error Message:* "+($json.execution?.error?.message || 'No error message available')+"
*Execution ID:* "+($json.execution?.id || 'N/A')+"
*Timestamp:* "+new Date().toISOString()+"

Please check the n8n execution log for details."}) }}
